tasks.subject: Task 1: Migration + schema + test-helper update
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `wfh_entries` table and `receipt_filename`/`receipt_content_type` columns to `transactions`; reflect in Drizzle schema and test-helper.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/db/migrations/0005_phase4.sql`
- Modify: `lib/db/schema.ts`
- Modify: `tests/helpers/db.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `npm run db:migrate` succeeds
- [ ] `wfh_entries` table exists with unique constraint on `(user_id, date)`
- [ ] `transactions.receipt_filename` and `transactions.receipt_content_type` columns exist
- [ ] `resetTestDb()` truncates `wfh_entries`

**Verify:** `npx vitest run tests/unit/db/schema.test.ts` → PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/db/migrations/0005_phase4.sql", "lib/db/schema.ts", "tests/helpers/db.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run tests/unit/db/schema.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Migration runs without error", "wfh_entries table with unique (user_id, date)", "receipt_filename + receipt_content_type on transactions", "resetTestDb truncates wfh_entries"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: FY utility + payslip queries
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Shared FY date-bound helpers and all payslip read-queries the UI needs.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/domain/fy.ts`
- Create: `lib/db/queries/payslips.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `fyBounds(2026)` returns `{ start: '2025-07-01', end: '2026-06-30' }`
- [ ] `getPayslipsByUser` returns payslips ordered by `pay_date DESC` with link status
- [ ] `getUnlinkedPayslips` excludes payslips that have an `income` link

**Verify:** `npx vitest run tests/unit/domain/fy.test.ts` → PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/domain/fy.ts", "lib/db/queries/payslips.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run tests/unit/domain/fy.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fyBounds(2026) returns {start: '2025-07-01', end: '2026-06-30'}", "getPayslipsByUser returns by pay_date DESC with link status", "getUnlinkedPayslips excludes income-linked payslips"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Payslip-linking domain + unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure `matchPayslipToIncome` function with confidence scoring and full unit-test coverage.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/domain/payslip-linking.ts`
- Create: `tests/unit/domain/payslip-linking.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Exact amount + date match scores 0.70
- [ ] Employer name in description adds 0.20
- [ ] Matching pay_cadences adds 0.10
- [ ] Returns empty array when no candidate within ±3 days
- [ ] Already-linked transactions excluded

**Verify:** `npx vitest run tests/unit/domain/payslip-linking.test.ts` → PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/domain/payslip-linking.ts", "tests/unit/domain/payslip-linking.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run tests/unit/domain/payslip-linking.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Exact match scores 0.70 base", "+0.20 for employer name in description", "+0.10 for matching pay cadence", "No match outside ±3 day window", "Already-linked transactions excluded"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Link-payslips job + actions + integration tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** pg-boss job that matches and auto-confirms payslips; server actions for user confirm/skip/manual-link.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/jobs/link-payslips.ts`
- Modify: `lib/jobs/index.ts`
- Create: `app/actions/payslips.ts`
- Create: `tests/integration/jobs/link-payslips.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Job auto-confirms link when confidence ≥ 0.90 (source='auto')
- [ ] Job stores suggested link when confidence < 0.90 (source='suggested')
- [ ] `confirmLink` sets source='user' on existing link
- [ ] `skipLink` deletes the suggested link row
- [ ] `manualLink` inserts a new link with source='user'

**Verify:** `npx vitest run tests/integration/jobs/link-payslips.test.ts` → PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/jobs/link-payslips.ts", "lib/jobs/index.ts", "app/actions/payslips.ts", "tests/integration/jobs/link-payslips.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run tests/integration/jobs/link-payslips.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Job auto-confirms at confidence >= 0.90", "Job stores suggested at confidence < 0.90", "confirmLink sets source=user", "skipLink deletes suggested link", "manualLink inserts with source=user"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Income-summary queries + integration tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Three query functions for the income dashboard: period totals, monthly breakdown, per-employer breakdown.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/db/queries/income-summary.ts`
- Create: `tests/integration/db/income-summary.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `getIncomeSummary` returns correct aggregates for a date range
- [ ] `getIncomeByMonth` returns one row per month in range, ordered chronologically
- [ ] `getIncomeByEmployer` returns one row per distinct employer
- [ ] All three return empty/zero when no payslips in range

**Verify:** `npx vitest run tests/integration/db/income-summary.test.ts` → PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/db/queries/income-summary.ts", "tests/integration/db/income-summary.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run tests/integration/db/income-summary.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["getIncomeSummary returns correct aggregates", "getIncomeByMonth returns one row per month ordered chronologically", "getIncomeByEmployer returns one row per employer", "All return empty/zero when no payslips in range"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: /income layout + sub-nav + nav link + stub pages
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Shared `/income` layout with sub-nav tabs; `Income` entry in main sidebar nav; four stub pages that load without error.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/(authenticated)/income/layout.tsx`
- Create: `app/(authenticated)/income/page.tsx` (stub)
- Create: `app/(authenticated)/income/payslips/page.tsx` (stub)
- Create: `app/(authenticated)/income/wfh/page.tsx` (stub)
- Create: `app/(authenticated)/income/receipts/page.tsx` (stub)
- Modify: `middleware.ts`
- Modify: `components/nav.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `/income`, `/income/payslips`, `/income/wfh`, `/income/receipts` all render without 404
- [ ] Sub-nav highlights the active tab
- [ ] `Income` appears in sidebar between Subscriptions and Runway

**Verify:** `npm run build` → 0 errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/(authenticated)/income/layout.tsx", "app/(authenticated)/income/page.tsx", "app/(authenticated)/income/payslips/page.tsx", "app/(authenticated)/income/wfh/page.tsx", "app/(authenticated)/income/receipts/page.tsx", "middleware.ts", "components/nav.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All four /income routes render without 404", "Sub-nav highlights active tab", "Income in sidebar between Subscriptions and Runway"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Payslips review page + link-panel component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full `/income/payslips` page with paginated payslip list and detail panel for linking review.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/(authenticated)/income/payslips/page.tsx`
- Create: `components/payslip-link-panel.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Payslip list shows status badge (Linked/Review/Unlinked)
- [ ] Clicking a Review payslip opens detail panel with candidate transaction and confidence
- [ ] Confirm link calls `confirmLink` action and revalidates
- [ ] Skip calls `skipLink` action and closes panel
- [ ] Linked payslips show matched deposit account + date

**Verify:** `npm run build` → 0 errors; manual smoke test in browser

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/(authenticated)/income/payslips/page.tsx", "components/payslip-link-panel.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Payslip list shows status badges", "Review payslip shows detail panel with candidate + confidence", "Confirm link action works", "Skip action works", "Linked payslips show deposit info"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Income dashboard page + summary cards + chart
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full `/income` dashboard with FY/calendar-year selector, four summary cards, Recharts grouped bar chart, per-employer table, and payslip list.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/(authenticated)/income/page.tsx`
- Create: `components/income-summary-cards.tsx`
- Create: `components/income-chart.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] FY selector defaults to current FY; switching to calendar year updates all data
- [ ] Four summary cards show gross, tax withheld, super, net with payslip count
- [ ] Recharts bar chart with four series renders without error
- [ ] Per-employer table visible only when ≥ 2 employers
- [ ] Payslip list at bottom with row-click navigating to `/income/payslips?highlight={id}`

**Verify:** `npm run build` → 0 errors; manual smoke test in browser

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/(authenticated)/income/page.tsx", "components/income-summary-cards.tsx", "components/income-chart.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FY selector defaults to current FY", "Four summary cards render", "Recharts bar chart with four series", "Per-employer table shown only with >= 2 employers", "Payslip list with row-click navigation"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: WFH queries + server actions + integration tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Query functions and server actions for WFH entry management.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/db/queries/wfh-entries.ts`
- Create: `app/actions/wfh.ts`
- Create: `tests/integration/db/wfh-entries.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- [ ] `getWfhSummaryByFY` returns total hours and monthly breakdown

**Verify:** `npx vitest run tests/integration/db/wfh-entries.test.ts` → PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/db/queries/wfh-entries.ts", "app/actions/wfh.ts", "tests/integration/db/wfh-entries.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run tests/integration/db/wfh-entries.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["getWfhEntriesByMonth returns entries for month", "getWfhSummaryByFY returns totals + monthly breakdown", "upsertWfhEntry inserts or updates", "deleteWfhEntry removes entry", "FY boundary correct"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: WFH page + calendar + summary-panel
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full `/income/wfh` page with interactive monthly calendar grid and summary panel showing FY deduction estimate.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/(authenticated)/income/wfh/page.tsx`
- Create: `components/wfh-calendar.tsx`
- Create: `components/wfh-summary-panel.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Monthly calendar grid renders Mon–Sun columns with weekends greyed out
- [ ] Clicking a workday opens popover with hours input (default 8, step 0.5)
- [ ] Save calls `upsertWfhEntry`; Clear calls `deleteWfhEntry`
- [ ] Summary panel shows FY total hours, estimated deduction (hours × $0.67), monthly breakdown
- [ ] ATO disclaimer rendered in footer

**Verify:** `npm run build` → 0 errors; manual smoke test in browser

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/(authenticated)/income/wfh/page.tsx", "components/wfh-calendar.tsx", "components/wfh-summary-panel.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Calendar grid with weekends greyed out", "Popover with hours input on workday click", "upsertWfhEntry/deleteWfhEntry called correctly", "Summary panel with deduction estimate", "ATO disclaimer in footer"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Receipt R2 helpers + upload endpoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** R2 upload helper for receipts, presigned URL getter, and POST upload endpoint.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/storage/put-receipt.ts`
- Create: `lib/storage/get-signed-url.ts`
- Create: `app/api/receipts/upload/route.ts`
- Create: `tests/integration/api/receipts-upload.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `npm install @aws-sdk/s3-request-presigner` succeeds
- [ ] R2 key format: `{userId}/receipts/{transactionId}/{uuid}.{ext}`
- [ ] Endpoint rejects non-PDF/JPEG/PNG content types with 400
- [ ] Endpoint rejects files > 10 MB with 400
- [ ] Endpoint rejects `transactionId` belonging to a different user with 403
- [ ] On success: `receipt_object_key`, `receipt_filename`, `receipt_content_type`, `receipt_uploaded_at` written to transaction row

**Verify:** `npx vitest run tests/integration/api/receipts-upload.test.ts` → PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/storage/put-receipt.ts", "lib/storage/get-signed-url.ts", "app/api/receipts/upload/route.ts", "tests/integration/api/receipts-upload.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run tests/integration/api/receipts-upload.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["R2 key format: {userId}/receipts/{transactionId}/{uuid}.{ext}", "Rejects non-PDF/JPEG/PNG with 400", "Rejects >10MB with 400", "Rejects other user's transactionId with 403", "Writes receipt metadata to transaction row"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Receipts query + delete action + integration tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Read and delete query functions for the receipts vault.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/db/queries/receipts.ts`
- Create: `app/actions/receipts.ts`
- Create: `tests/integration/db/receipts.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `getReceiptsByFY` only returns transactions where `receipt_object_key IS NOT NULL`
- [ ] `getReceiptsByFY` filters by `posted_date` within FY bounds
- [ ] `getReceiptsByFY` orders by `posted_date DESC`
- [ ] `deleteReceipt` clears receipt columns and deletes R2 object

**Verify:** `npx vitest run tests/integration/db/receipts.test.ts` → PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/db/queries/receipts.ts", "app/actions/receipts.ts", "tests/integration/db/receipts.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run tests/integration/db/receipts.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["getReceiptsByFY excludes null receipt_object_key", "getReceiptsByFY filters by FY date bounds", "getReceiptsByFY orders by posted_date DESC", "deleteReceipt clears columns and removes R2 object"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: Receipts vault page + modals + transaction paperclip
tasks.description: **Goal:** Full `/income/receipts` vault with FY tabs and receipt grid; upload and viewer modals; paperclip icon on transaction rows. **Files:** - Modify: `app/(authenticated)/income/receipts/page.tsx` - Create: `components/receipt-upload-modal.tsx` - Create: `components/receipt-viewer-modal.tsx` - Create: `components/receipt-cell.tsx` - Modify: `app/(authenticated)/accounts/[id]/transactions/page.tsx` **Acceptance Criteria:** - [ ] FY tabs show only years with at least one receipt - [ ] Receipt grid shows thumbnail (PDF icon or ``), filename, linked transaction, upload date - [ ] Upload modal accepts PDF/JPEG/PNG up to 10 MB with optional transaction link - [ ] Viewer modal shows PDF `
